subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin in Opening A. Release the thumb strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の糸を超えて小指手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the index strings and pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪を交換します
subtitle.en: Exchange the loops on the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に、中指と薬指を上から入れ、親指向こう側の糸を挟みます
subtitle.en: Insert the middle and ring fingers from above into the index loops and grasp the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指と薬指を人差し指の輪から引き出します。引き出した糸は薬指にかかります
subtitle.en: Draw the middle and ring fingers out of the index loops; the drawn-out strings fall onto the ring fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指と人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the thumb and index strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 小指の輪に左右の親指を下から入れ、小指手前の糸と薬指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the little-finger loops and pick up from below the near little-finger strings and the far ring-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the ring-finger strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を静かに外します
subtitle.en: Gently release the little-finger strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を静かに外します
subtitle.en: Gently release the little-finger strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で親指向こう側の糸を取り、指先を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings and turn the fingertips away to show the finished figure.
